g.text: A high-priority failure mode where safety takes precedence over conceptual scaffolding.

SHORT_RISK - The source terminals are connected by a near-zero-resistance path.
- The source terminals are effectively bridged by a very low-resistance path.
- Break the shortcut path before restarting the circuit.
- Escalate to instructor-led correction after repeated or safety-sensitive errors.
- Switch from autonomous coaching to supervised correction immediately.
The wiring creates a near-zero-resistance path across the source and must be treated as
unsafe before any instructional discussion continues.
